data.name: Hentai Age Summer
data.detailed_description:
Dive into a charming and relaxing puzzle adventure where every level you complete unveils stunning, alluring images of beautiful girls. Gentle background music enhances the soothing atmosphere as you swap and arrange tiles to reveal the full picture. Each stage becomes progressively more challenging, putting both your concentration and strategy to the test.

Enjoy the freedom of playing without time limits, allowing you to solve puzzles at your own pace. Whether you’re a casual player or a puzzle lover, this game delivers a visually captivating and rewarding experience.

Features:

Unlock enchanting and attractive girl images as you clear each level.

Relax with soft background music that enhances your gameplay.

View the complete picture after finishing every puzzle.

Experience countless stages with increasing levels of difficulty.

Play stress-free with no timers—enjoy puzzles at your own rhythm.

data.short_description: Relax with a soothing puzzle game where each level reveals alluring images of beautiful girls. Enjoy calming music, no time limits, and progressively challenging puzzles for a rewarding experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
